Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Join Emeril for a Mexican birthday fiesta!
Video.title: Real Mexican

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Split Pea and Ham Hock Soup, Chicken Bacon and White Bean Soup-Portuguese Style, Nola Turtle Soup
Video.title: Hearty Soups

Video.summary: Sauteed Flounder with Tomatoes and Olives, Baked Stuffed Flounder, Pan-Fried Flounder in Cornmeal with Smoked Oyster-Artichoke Relish
Video.title: Flounder

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: Sourdough starters, fresh bread, sandwiches and blueberry pancakes.
Video.title: Sourdough 101

Video.summary: Cheesy Garlic Stuffed French Bread; Mr John's Meat-Stuffed Bell Peppers; Crab Meat and Shrimp Stuffed Eggplant; Peach and Almond Cannoli
Video.title: Stuff It

Video.summary: Skate Wing with Grenoble Sauce, Monkfish Court Bouillon, Mousse of Pike with Lobster Salad, Cornmeal-Crusted Lemon Fish with Potato Lyonnaise and Crab Meat Ravigote
Video.title: Uncommon Fish

Video.summary: Spinach Salad with Nut-Crusted Goat Cheese, Trout Almondine, Pistachio-Crusted Rack of Lamb with Mashed Potatoes and Peasant-Style Sauce, Macadamia Nut Tart
Video.title: Going Nuts

Video.summary: Crawfish Egg Rolls with Hot Sesame Drizzle, Crawfish Imperial, Crawfish Burgers, Fried Crawfish Tails with Olive Salad
Video.title: Crawfish Season

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Pea Soup, Deep-Dish Meat Pie, Sugar Pie
Video.title: French Canadian Cuisine

Video.summary: Jillie's Pesto Dip; Marinated Mushroom Salad; Alden's Grandmother's Meat and Potato Casserole; Jessie's Big Chocolate Chip Cookies
Video.title: Our Family Traditions

Video.summary: Kibbeh with Yogurt Sauce, Shabu-Shabu with Sesame Dipping Sauce, Barbecued Beef in Lettuce Wrapper, Steak Pie
Video.title: International Beef

Video.summary: Herbed Pan Roast of Salmon with Warm Greens and Herb Vinaigrette; Focaccia with Savory and Olives; Tarragon Chicken Salad; Cilantro-Avocado Potato Salad; Mint Julep Sorbet
Video.title: Emeril's Herb Garden

Video.summary: Emeril kicks-up an old favorite, the casserole: Lamb and White Bean Casserole; Cowboy Chicken Casserole; Emeril's Favorite Choucroute Casserole; Risotto and Wild Mushroom Casserole
Video.title: Casseroles for Every Occasion

Video.summary: Roasted Garlic-Stuffed Olive Martinis; Cornish Meat Pasties; Sicilian-Style Stuffed Beef Roulades; Provencal-Style Stuffed Zucchini; Trout Stuffed with Herbs and Garlic
Video.title: Stuffed Stuff

Video.summary: Take a trip to New England with Emeril! His special guest, chef Neil Connolly, will join him as they sample traditional East Coast fare
Video.title: New England's Best

Video.summary: Aloo Palak, Skordalia with Fried Calamari, Steak Frites, Shepherd's Pie
Video.title: World Famous Potatoes

Video.summary: Emeril has recipes for easy entertaining! Smoked-salmon spread in cucumber cups, spring rolls, pistachio and goat cheese-stuffed figs, and marinated blue crab claws
Video.title: Quick and Easy Hors d'oeuvres

Video.summary: Campfire Steaks, Beef Roulades with Blue Cheese and Walnuts
Video.title: Emerilized Beef

Video.summary: Olive and Roasted Pine Nut, Sun-Dried Tomato, Rosemary, Basil, Black Pepper and Parmesan Reggiano Bread, Chicken Confit Sandwich
Video.title: Herb Breads

Video.summary: Hot and Sour Cabbage, Cabbage Rolls, Fancified Sauerkraut
Video.title: Cabbage

Video.summary: Nola's Boudin with Smothered Onions, Sweet Potato Crouton, Funky Smothered Sweetbreads, Braised Celery Root with Grilled Venison and Celery Root Mashed Potatoes
Video.title: Braising Techniques
